# Heading

A component for rendering heading elements (`h1` through `h6`) with consistent styling and size variants.

## Import

```jsx
import { Heading } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `as` | `"h1" \| "h2" \| "h3" \| "h4" \| "h5" \| "h6"` | `"h2"` | The heading level to render |
| `size` | `"xs" \| "sm" \| "md" \| "lg" \| "xl" \| "2xl" \| "3xl" \| "4xl"` | - | The visual size of the heading |
| `color` | `string` | - | Sets the text color |
| `fontWeight` | `string` | - | Sets the font weight |
| `textAlign` | `string` | - | Sets the text alignment |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the underlying element |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
<Heading>Default Heading</Heading>
```

### Different heading levels

```jsx
<Heading as="h1" size="4xl">Page Title</Heading>
<Heading as="h2" size="2xl">Section Title</Heading>
<Heading as="h3" size="xl">Subsection Title</Heading>
<Heading as="h4" size="lg">Card Title</Heading>
<Heading as="h5" size="md">Small Title</Heading>
<Heading as="h6" size="sm">Label Title</Heading>
```

### With custom styling

```jsx
<Heading as="h2" size="xl" color="gray.700" fontWeight="semibold">
  Styled Heading
</Heading>
```

### Extra small

```jsx
<Heading as="h6" size="xs">
  Extra Small Heading
</Heading>
```

## Features

- Renders semantic heading elements (`h1`-`h6`) via the `as` prop
- Supports 8 size variants from `xs` to `4xl`
- Supports all Chakra UI style props for inline styling
- Forwards refs to the underlying DOM element
- Defaults to rendering an `h2` element
